description: Workflow section has two items numbered 3 (lines 144 and 145); second item 3 and item 4 should be renumbered to 4 and 5 respectively
suggested_fix: Renumber the second step-3 to step-4 and the current step-4 to step-5 in the Workflow section

pattern: wrong config path in EXTEND.md search
description: Step 0 EXTEND.md search paths reference .baoyu-skills/baoyu-image-cards/EXTEND.md instead of .baoyu-skills/baoyu-xhs-images/EXTEND.md; deprecated skill has no config isolation from its replacement
suggested_fix: Replace all three baoyu-image-cards path references in Step 0 with baoyu-xhs-images paths, or document the intentional coupling explicitly in the skill frontmatter

description: Runtime dependencies sharp, pdf-lib, and pptxgenjs use ^ ranges; a compromised patch release could be silently installed on next npm install
suggested_fix: Pin to exact versions (e.g. sharp 0.34.5) or enforce lockfile-only installs with npm ci in CI

pattern: deprecation notice embedded in description field
description: Description field opens with [Deprecated: use baoyu-imagine] inline rather than using a dedicated deprecated flag or frontmatter key
suggested_fix: Move deprecation notice to a dedicated frontmatter field (e.g. deprecated: true, successor: baoyu-imagine) and keep description clean

pattern: deprecation notice embedded in description field
description: Description field opens with [Deprecated: use baoyu-image-cards] inline rather than using a dedicated deprecated flag or frontmatter key
suggested_fix: Move deprecation notice to a dedicated frontmatter field and keep description clean

description: All other skills carry version and metadata.openclaw frontmatter; baoyu-diagram is missing both, reducing marketplace discoverability
suggested_fix: Add version field matching current semver and metadata.openclaw.homepage matching the repo pattern

description: Skill has no post-generation completion report step; agents have no structured success signal after image generation completes
suggested_fix: Add a completion step that reports provider, model, output path, and image count after generation

description: Deprecated skill mirrors baoyu-imagine but also lacks a post-generation completion report step
suggested_fix: Add a brief completion summary step consistent with baoyu-imagine if this skill is to be kept functional

description: Workflow ends after scripts open the browser; no structured completion report is defined for the overall skill invocation
suggested_fix: Add a Step that emits a summary (post type, title if available, browser opened, what the user needs to do next)

description: Workflow ends after scripts open the browser; no structured completion report is defined
suggested_fix: Add a Step that emits a summary (post type, character count check, browser opened, required manual action)

description: Four-item workflow section has no final completion step reporting the saved file path, media status, and quality gate result
suggested_fix: Add a Step 5 completion report listing output path, media download decision, and quality gate outcome

description: 'Clear, meaningful description' appears twice in Step 6 commit message guidance; 'meaningful' is not actionable or measurable
suggested_fix: Replace with concrete guidance, e.g. 'describe what changed and why in imperative mood, under 72 characters'

description: 'obvious typos' in Step 2 analysis guidance — what counts as obvious is subjective and may lead to inconsistent behavior across runs
suggested_fix: Replace with 'typos where the intended word is unambiguous from context (e.g. misspelled common words, wrong homophones)'

description: 'short variable names' in Code Style section — threshold is undefined; could encourage overly abbreviated identifiers
suggested_fix: Replace with a concrete guideline, e.g. 'prefer concise names; abbreviate only when context makes the meaning obvious (e.g. err, ctx, i)'

pattern: no numbered workflow steps for multi-step consent gate
description: The consent check (5-step flow) and EXTEND.md preferences section exist as prose sections but are not organized as a numbered workflow; reduces agent traversal confidence for first-time users
suggested_fix: Add a numbered Workflow section (Step 1: Consent Check, Step 2: Load Preferences, Step 3: Execute) consistent with other skills in the repo

pattern: deprecated skill references sibling skill config path
description: baoyu-xhs-images Step 0 EXTEND.md paths point to baoyu-image-cards directories; violates skill self-containment principle in CLAUDE.md and causes config namespace pollution
suggested_fix: Either give the deprecated skill its own config paths or add an explicit migration note in frontmatter explaining the intentional coupling

pattern: version drift between deprecated skill and active replacement
description: baoyu-image-gen is at v1.56.4 while baoyu-imagine is at v1.58.0; baoyu-imagine documents DashScope wan2.7-image --ref support (line 94) that is absent from baoyu-image-gen (line 90), confirming sync drift
suggested_fix: Apply the DashScope wan2.7-image-pro/wan2.7-image --ref note to baoyu-image-gen to keep the skills in sync per CLAUDE.md policy
